summary: Iteration 40 - Tested Word-like text editing features for ZET Mindshare Editor. All 8 features tested and verified: click anywhere on canvas creates text at margin-aligned position (x=60), text element width is fixed (pageWidth - 120), both Select and Hand tools allow canvas click to create text, no text tool in toolbar, ZETA/Judge empty state messages present, Judge Mini no photo upload, Deep Analysis 'Belgeye Ekle' button exists.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 Word-like text editing features all working: (1) Click empty canvas in Select/Hand tool creates text at x=60 (left margin), (2) Text width is fixed to pageWidth-120, (3) contentEditable handles typing with Enter for new lines, (4) No text tool needed - Select/Hand tools now handle text creation, (5) Both AI panels show 'auto document viewing' empty messages, (6) Deep Analysis 'Belgeye Ekle' button adds results to document. Previous iteration 39 features still working.
